docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, ROBERT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY MOORE, ROBERTA AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, ROBERTA AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, ROBERT

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, ROBERTA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
